name: sgcsign-delphi
description: Use when writing Delphi or C++Builder code that uses the eSeGeCe sgcSign library (digital signatures: XAdES, PAdES, CAdES, Authenticode, ClickOnce, NuGet, VSIX; RFC 3161 timestamping; OCSP; and key providers for PFX, PEM, PKCS11/HSM, Azure Trusted Signing, AWS KMS, Google Cloud KMS, HashiCorp Vault, Certum). Provides the public component API (properties, methods, events), the unit/uses mapping, and full demo source examples, for developers who do not have the library source.
